title: Pill Soccer
description: Get ready for the most challenging soccer matches with Pill Soccer. Play against dozens of real players or challenge your friends on “2 Player” mode. On Google Play Store https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.hihoygames.PillSoccer
instructions: 2 Player Mode Player 1 Jump Up Arrow Left Left Arrow Right Right Arrow Kick P or Down Arrow Super Bonus K Player 2 Jump W Left D Right A Kick S
